notes: Deliberately includes two real parser limitations, scored honestly rather than avoided: (1) 'Software Engineer II Netflix' has no title/org separator the heuristic recognizes, so it cannot split title from company; (2) 'Technical Proficiencies' is not in the recognized skills-header vocabulary, so the skills section is missed entirely. Both are expected to fail in the scoring run — this fixture exists to keep the benchmark honest rather than artificially perfect.
